zh.All Saints' Church, Ashbocking, Suffolk,: 英國素福爾可阿希波金哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇
zh.Ashbocking, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可阿希波金
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hill於1470年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Richard Hill18歲，母親Mrs Richard Hill19歲。他於1500年與Blanche Suger在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年在英國素福爾可阿希波金享年61歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可阿希波金哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hill于1470年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Richard Hill18岁，母亲Mrs Richard Hill19岁。他于1500年与Blanche Suger在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1531年在英国素福爾可阿希波金享年61岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可阿希波金哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hill was born in 1470, in Shropshire, England, his father, Richard Hill, was 18 and his mother, Mrs Richard Hill, was 19. He married Blanche Suger in 1500, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1531, in Ashbocking, Suffolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Ashbocking, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hill est né en 1470, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hill, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard Hill, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Blanche Suger en 1500, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1531, à Ashbocking, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Ashbocking, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.All Saints' Church, Ashbocking, Suffolk,: イギリススフォルクアシュボクイングアル サイントス' チャーチ
ja.Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.Ashbocking, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクアシュボクイング
ja.lifeSummary: John Hillが1470年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Hillは18歳，母Mrs Richard Hillは19歳であった。1500年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでBlanche Sugerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1531年にイギリススフォルクアシュボクイングで61歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクアシュボクイングアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Ashbocking, Suffolk,: 영국 수폴크 애쉬보킨그 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Hill(이)가 1470년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hill(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Richard Hill(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Blanche Suger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 영국 수폴크 애쉬보킨그에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 애쉬보킨그 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Blanche Suger em 1500, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.All Saints' Church, Ashbocking, Suffolk,: алл сеинц' чурч, ашбоккинг, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hill родился в 1470 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hill было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard Hill, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche Suger в 1500 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1531 г. в местности ашбоккинг, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, ашбоккинг, суффолк, Англия.
